artifacts.imageOrder: executes before Node, listener bind, migration, recovery, spawn, or effect code
spawned only after lease admission and workspace registration
invoked per admitted bounded workspace effect from a neutral cwd

consumerAcceptance: W6 emits one inventory row for each artifactId with final binary SHA-256, protocol SHA-256, build recipe ID, builder image digest, compiler identity, target ABI, UID, GID, mode and finalImagePath

fixed SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH, locale, timezone, umask and output names
